message.content: Database connection error: ECONNREFUSED 127.0.0.1:5432 — postgres is not reachable.

content.text: ECONNREFUSED on postgres port 5432 means postgres is not running. Start it with: pg_ctl start -D /usr/local/var/postgres or via systemctl start postgresql. The connection error will be resolved once postgres is running.

message.content: Still getting the error even after starting postgres.

content.text: Check your DATABASE_URL env var — the host might be wrong. If running in docker, use the service name not 127.0.0.1. Solution: set DATABASE_URL=postgresql://user:pass@postgres:5432/db. Error fixed after updating the host.
